summary: package eu.kalafatic.utils.xml; import java.util.HashMap; import java.util.Iterator; import java.util.Map; import org.eclipse.jface.text.AbstractDocument; import org.eclipse.jface.text.IDocumentPartitioner; import org.eclipse.jface.text.IRegion; import org.eclipse.jface.text.Position; import org.eclipse.jface.text.source.Annotation; import org.eclipse.jface.text.source.IAnnotationModel; import org.eclipse.jface.text.source.ISourceViewer; import org.eclipse.ui.texteditor.spelling.SpellingAnnotation; import org.eclipse.ui.texteditor.spelling.SpellingReconcileStrategy; import org.eclipse.ui.texteditor.spelling.SpellingService; @SuppressWarnings({ "rawtypes", "unchecked" }) public class XMLSpellingReconcileStrategy extends SpellingReconcileStrategy { public XMLSpellingReconcileStrategy(ISourceViewer sourceViewer, SpellingService spellingService) { super(sourceViewer, spellingService); }
